executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
1. The production app crash is FIXED (import.meta.env dynamic access replaced). 
2. Language switcher ADDED (globe icon in header). 
3. Explicit error messages ADDED to Login page.
4. DEMO ACCOUNT: Use 'info@re-set.com.tr' and '123456' for ALL login actions unless the test specifically creates a new user first. 
5. The /booking page REQUIRES authentication. Login before booking.
6. The blog might be empty if no posts exist in Supabase (this is OK).
Wait for the page to fully load. 
If a white screen appears, wait 2 seconds. 
Interact with the elements. All Turkish strings have common translation fallbacks.
